name: VeloContentAsset
description: Marketplace-ready content assets for platform submissions.

platform_application_id.description: ID of the linked platform application.

platform_profile_id.description: ID of the linked platform profile.

target_department.description: Target department like freelance, crypto, trade.

asset_type.description: Type: profile_headline, professional_bio, service_listing, portfolio_blurb, proposal_template, intro_message, faq_answer, package_description

title.description: Title or headline for the asset.

body.description: Full content body of the asset.

tone.description: The tone used in the content.

status.description: Status: draft, ready, selected, archived, needs_revision

strengths.description: Key strengths of this content piece.

file_url.description: URL to a generated file or image for this asset.

source_context_summary.description: Safe summary of source context used for generation.

selected_for_submission.description: Whether this asset is selected for manual submission.

last_used_at.description: Last time this asset was copied or used.
